_comment: Shared workspace configuration — Single Source of Truth for MCP, agents, and settings across all Loofi repos.

docker-mcp.description: Docker Desktop MCP Toolkit — Context7, Fetch, Filesystem, Gemini API Docs, GitHub, Memory, Playwright, Puppeteer, Sequential Thinking, Time

definitions.name: project-coordinator
definitions.description: Plans, breaks down, and coordinates complex features across repos

definitions.name: architecture-advisor
definitions.description: Designs features, plans code organization, reviews architecture

definitions.name: backend-builder
definitions.description: Implements or modifies backend service modules

definitions.name: frontend-integration-builder
definitions.description: Builds or modifies React/PyQt components, integrates state management

definitions.name: code-implementer
definitions.description: Implements code changes across any repo

definitions.name: test-writer
definitions.description: Creates or updates unit tests for code changes

definitions.name: release-planner
definitions.description: Plans releases, decomposes features into atomic tasks

Loofi-Veo-prompt-generator.description: Professional prompt generator for Google Veo and OpenAI Sora video models

loofi-fedora-tweaks.description: AI tweaker app for Fedora 43 KDE Plasma

plasma-ai-usage-monitor.description: KDE Plasma 6 panel widget to monitor AI API token usage, rate limits, and costs

Loofi-Suno-AI-Generator.description: AI-powered Suno song generator with React frontend and FastAPI backend
